# UpDown — Belief Registry for Technology Races

> UpDown is a platform where people record their true beliefs about which technology will win in competitive matchups. No money involved — just truth and recognition. When a race concludes, correct predictors are celebrated in the Hall of Vindication.

## What is UpDown?

UpDown tracks technology "races" — competitive matchups where two or more technologies compete for dominance. Users review evidence for both sides, then publicly record their prediction. A unique feature: if users are professionally pressured to act against their belief (e.g., an engineer forced to build copilots while believing agents will win), their "conviction score" increases — making their eventual vindication more significant.

## Website
- URL: https://xhardtech.com
- Type: Static website (HTML, CSS, vanilla JS)
- Hosted: GitHub Pages

## Active Technology Races

### 1. Agentic AI vs AI Copilots
- Race page: https://xhardtech.com/race/agentic-ai-vs-copilots.html
- Question: Will >50% of Fortune 500 deploy Agentic AI for core business by Dec 2028?
- Side A: https://xhardtech.com/why/agentic-ai-will-win.html
- Side B: https://xhardtech.com/why/ai-copilots-will-win.html

### 2. Open-source LLM vs Closed-source LLM
- Race page: https://xhardtech.com/race/llm-open-vs-closed.html
- Question: Will open-source LLMs reach >95% on MMLU benchmark before closed-source?
- Side A: https://xhardtech.com/why/open-source-llm-will-win.html
- Side B: https://xhardtech.com/why/closed-source-llm-will-win.html

### 3. VinFast vs Japanese Cars (Vietnam Market)
- Race page: https://xhardtech.com/race/vinfast-vs-xe-nhat.html
- Question: Will VinFast outsell Toyota in quarterly Vietnam car sales before Dec 2027?
- Side A: https://xhardtech.com/why/vinfast-se-thang.html
- Side B: https://xhardtech.com/why/xe-nhat-se-thang.html

### 4. Vietnam Factory Robots — 3-Way Race
- Race page: https://xhardtech.com/race/robot-nha-may-vn.html
- Question: Which robot approach wins Vietnam's factories by 2030?
- Humanoid: https://xhardtech.com/why/humanoid-se-thang.html
- Cobot: https://xhardtech.com/why/cobot-se-thang.html
- AMR+AI: https://xhardtech.com/why/amr-ai-se-thang.html

### 5. Humanoid Robots vs Human Labor (Vietnam)
- Question: Will humanoid robots replace unskilled labor in Vietnam before 2030?
- Side A: https://xhardtech.com/why/robot-se-thang.html
- Side B: https://xhardtech.com/why/lao-dong-se-thang.html

## Hall of Vindication
- URL: https://xhardtech.com/vindication.html
- Historical cases: Steven Sasson vs Kodak, Nokia Engineers vs Management, Netflix vs Blockbuster, Cloud vs On-premise, Linux vs Windows Server

## Key Concepts
- **Belief Registry**: A public record of technology predictions
- **Conviction Score**: Higher when a person believes against professional/social pressure
- **Vindication**: Public celebration when a prediction is proven correct
- **Pressure Signal**: The gap between what someone believes and what they're forced to do — the most honest signal in technology prediction
